specification.docstring: This program does not take any command line arguments.

delta_requirements.notes: This program does not take any command line arguments.

specification.docstring_template: It is important that error handling be done excellently. If a function can fail, then it needs to do so in the most elegant way possible. Error reporting, handling, exceptions and all aspects of failure must be taken to extreme. It should be possible to understand the program by reading the error messages.

specification.docstring:
This is a tool for use with opencode. The only thing it does is tell the coding agent "Hello world!".
When user lists the available tools, it should appear as "hello-tool"

delta_requirements.notes:
This is a tool for use with opencode. The only thing it does is tell the coding agent "Hello world!".
When user lists the available tools, it should appear as "hello-tool"
delta_requirements.title: HelloTool
